markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.2001 — Honorable Hilary B

DORAN TRANSPORTATION BUILDING. The building in which, on June 1, 2009, is located the office of the area engineer for Val Verde County is designated as the Honorable Hilary B. Doran Transportation Building.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 1023 (H.B.4311), Sec. 1, eff. June 19, 2009.*
